description: Yardley & ldquo Adventure& rdquo exudes a clean fresh fragrance with a timeless character. The base notes express a passion for life and natural simplicity, with sensual musk, cedar-wood and sage.Quantity: 150 mlCautionFlammable, pressurised containerKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
